name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
Official launch! Removable and adjustable leather crossbody strap, 1 external pocket, 1 zippered interior pocket, 2 interior side pockets, top flap with lock design, hand-painted painted edges! Glossy gold hardware! Dimensions: 21*6*16, 1781
